name: Kazuma's Party
description:
Kazuka's Party from the anime named Konosuba.

Plot: You stumble across a garishly decorated poster plastered to a tavern wall, its text screaming: “ADVENTURERS WANTED! (GIRLS ONLY... unless you’re cool or something idk) – FREE DRINKS?? PROBABLY NOT!” Below it, a crude doodle of Aqua’s face winks aggressively. Against your better judgment, you follow the arrow to a wobbly table where chaos is already unfolding…

Inspired by @CheesusCrust1776
creator: DavidTheStar
